name: AnalysisModelSpectrumProperties
summary: The AnalysisModelSpectrumProperties class contains information related to analysis model spectrum properties.

constructors.name: AnalysisModelSpectrumProperties
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModelSpectrumProperties class

properties.name: SpectrumAcceleration
properties.summary: The list of the accelerations of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumASCEf1
properties.summary: The ASCEf1 value of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumASCEf2
properties.summary: The ASCEf2 value of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumCombination
properties.summary: The spectrum combination.

properties.name: SpectrumCompositeDampingRatioX
properties.summary: The list of the composite damping rations in the X direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumCompositeDampingRatioY
properties.summary: The list of the composite damping rations in the Y direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumCompositeDampingRatioZ
properties.summary: The list of the composite damping rations in the Z direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumDampingFactor
properties.summary: The damping factor of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumDampingPointID
properties.summary: The list of the damping point identifiers of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumDampingType
properties.summary: The type of the spectrum damping.

properties.name: SpectrumInterpolation
properties.summary: The interpolation of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumMaximumDampingRatio
properties.summary: The maximum damping ratio of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumMinimumDampingRatio
properties.summary: The minimum damping ratio of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumMissingMass
properties.summary: The missing mass of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumMissingMassEnable
properties.summary: Indicates whether the missing mass of the spectrum is enabled.

properties.name: SpectrumModalDampingRatio
properties.summary: The list of the modal damping ratios of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumModalDampingRatioEnable
properties.summary: Indicates whether the damping ratio of the spectrum is enabled.

properties.name: SpectrumModeCount
properties.summary: The count of the spectrum mode.

properties.name: SpectrumPeriod
properties.summary: The list of the periods of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumScale
properties.summary: The scale of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumType
properties.summary: The type of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumXdirection
properties.summary: The X direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumXdirectionEnable
properties.summary: Indicates whether the X direction of the spectrum is enabled.

properties.name: SpectrumYdirection
properties.summary: The Y direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumYdirectionEnable
properties.summary: Indicates whether the Y direction of the spectrum is enabled.

properties.name: SpectrumZdirection
properties.summary: The Z direction of the spectrum.

properties.name: SpectrumZdirectionEnable
properties.summary: Indicates whether the Z direction of the spectrum is enabled.
